name: Presence Avatars
description: Horizontal stack of collaborator avatars showing who is currently viewing or editing. Each avatar has a unique presence color ring.

standard.description: Avatar stack with overflow count and hover tooltips

slots.avatars: Stacked avatar images with presence color ring
slots.tooltip: Hover shows full name and status

slots.overflow: +N more indicator with click to expand
